value.found_quote: Code Review analyzes your GitHub pull requests and posts findings as inline comments on the lines of code where it found issues. A fleet of specialized agents examine the code changes in the context of your full codebase, looking for logic errors, security vulnerabilities, broken edge cases, and subtle regressions... You can tune what Claude flags by adding a `CLAUDE.md` or `REVIEW.md` file to your repository.
value.name: Code Review
